headline: Magazine filter reactions, dispatch tone, and click affordance are repaired.
notes: Magazine city finder now filters by editorial track instead of vague mood text so fast, food, coast, and slow states actually react.
Quick suggestions now do something useful: food applies the food track, rainy and parents spotlight the matching editorial bases.
Magazine dispatch cards are rewritten in a more natural Korean editorial tone and now use clear button-style actions.
City cards and dispatch cards gain stronger click affordance and the magazine surface gets safer anchor offsets and bottom spacing on mobile.
